vocab.meaning: những món đồ đặc thù theo lịch trình
vocab.example: I meticulously select itinerary-specific items, such as a high-quality dry bag if my trip involves kayaking or island hopping.

vocab.meaning: đóng gói đồ đạc chật ních, đầy ắp
vocab.example: While I usually prefer minimalism, for family camping trips, I tend to pack the car to the rafters with extra bedding and cooking gear.
Traveling to a temperate climate requires a complete overhaul of my suitcase to include appropriate seasonal attire like heavy overcoats.

vocab.meaning: hình thức quan trọng hơn công năng (chọn đồ đẹp hơn đồ tiện)
vocab.example: When visiting fashion capitals like Paris, I occasionally prioritize form over function, packing stylish boots instead of practical sneakers.

vocab.meaning: quần áo chuyên dụng (chống nước, thoát mồ hôi, v.v.)
vocab.example: For trekking in the humid rainforests, technical apparel with moisture-wicking properties is an absolute must-have.

vocab.meaning: những đồ dùng thiết yếu kích cỡ nhỏ tiện lợi
vocab.example: To bypass airport security hassles, I always decant my skincare products into travel-sized essentials.
If the goal is urban exploration, my bag is usually lighter, containing just a power bank and a digital map.

vocab.meaning: những đồ dùng linh tinh phục vụ an toàn
vocab.example: I never embark on a solo hike without various safety paraphernalia, including a whistle and a thermal emergency blanket.
I try to streamline my luggage by choosing versatile garments that can be layered effectively in unpredictable weather.

vocab.meaning: những thiết bị công nghệ chuyên biệt
vocab.example: Depending on the destination, I might carry niche gadgets like a portable espresso maker for remote mountain stays.
